speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , the nurse said that you might have my test results in from the other day .

speaker: speaker2
text: I would like for you to come in and talk about a few more tests that I would like to run .

speaker: speaker1
text: Does this mean that you have bad news for me ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I just want to talk to you about the tests that I want to run .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can ’ t you just tell me now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don ’ t know anything for certain . We always do a double check if there is a question .

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to see you right away .

speaker: speaker2
text: You can come in this afternoon . If you are feeling too stressed , feel free to bring a friend along .

speaker: speaker1
text: I know for sure that something is wrong !

speaker: speaker2
text: Don ’ t worry about a thing ; we are just taking a second look and talking .
